plans.title: V1.23 Architecture & Crate Wiring Alignment — align knowledge specs, entity scopes, and actual crate graph
plans.notes: Batches A–E complete. QC tri-review 3× Approve. QA Pass (702/702). Ready for PR to main.

metadata.description: Reconcile OSS knowledge specs with actual crates, define entity scope ownership, wire previously split domain crates into product paths, and add drift guards.
metadata.branch_policy: single integration branch created from main; PR to main

batches.name: A — Spec clarification (Prepare)
batches.notes: Entity scope model created; crate architecture and CLI terminology reconciled; ARCHITECTURE.md updated. Commits: 0113773, 41df982, 74708b8

batches.name: B — Minimal domain interfaces
batches.notes: KnowledgeStore, KbStore, NarrativeGateway traits defined; contract enums deduplicated. Commits: 4828dcb, dda3bc0, 5fe5511, ac57d83

batches.name: C — Runtime wiring
batches.notes: cloud-sync→cloud-domain wired; moment-assembly→narrative/kb/knowledge wired; daemon 5 missing deps fixed; creator kb terminology clarified. Commits: 220608c, 4a6f646, 44c0fc2, ebb2e1b

batches.name: D — Persistence and migration cleanup
batches.notes: 16 storage ops audited, all correctly owned. Migration/wipe docs added. Commit: c73c7f2

batches.name: E — Tests, graph guards, docs
batches.notes: 18 new tests (drift guards + integration + cloud-domain). QA 702/702 pass. QC 3× Approve. Commits: 9f6f38e, 46f862c, 60fe91c, 2b0a7c4, fdce2fc

cross_cutting.title: rand 0.7.3 cannot be upgraded — blocked by wiremock → http-types upstream
cross_cutting.note: Blocked by wiremock → http-types upstream. Removed from V1.6 scope per V1.6 delivery compass decision.

2026-05-21-v1.23-architecture-crate-wiri.title: Doc comments missing on public trait definitions
InMemory implementations need production SQLite backing
Misaligned doc comments in key_block.rs before deprecate/merge_into/delete
Non-Send futures in assemble_moment
2026-05-21-v1.23-architecture-crate-wiri.note: Acceptable for current in-memory context; must resolve before multi-threaded daemon path.
